# neon Provider

Terraform provider for Neon serverless Postgres.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    neon = {
      source = "kenchan0130/neon"
    }
  }
}

provider "neon" {
  # api_key = "..." # Or set NEON_API_KEY environment variable
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The Neon API key. Can also be set via the `NEON_API_KEY` environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) The base URL for the Neon API. Defaults to `https://console.neon.tech/api/v2`.
